goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'friday' and should depart from 'london liverpool street'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should 'leave after 08:45'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for a train. The train should leave on friday and should depart from london liverpool street
The train should go to cambridge and should leave after 08:45
